subcodes.first_line: O ye divine friends! Render ye thanks unto God that ye have been assisted and have established the Mashriqu'l-Adhkár and in [3.5s]... ...Obligatory prayer and supplication cause man to reach the kingdom of mystery, and the worship of the Supreme One
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی شکر کنید خدا را که موفق شدید و تاسیس مشرق الاذکار نمودید و در
subcodes.subjects: @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @law of obligatory prayer, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
